message:
docs(plan): Add feedback-driven enhancements to ms CLI spec

Incorporate substantive improvements from review feedback:
- Add MCP server mode (Section 4.8) for native agent tool integration
- Add block-level overlays with surgical patch operations (Section 3.5)
- Add meta-skills concept for composed slice bundles (Section 6.6)
- Expand test harness with retrieval and packing tests (Section 18.9)
- Add taint tracking through extraction→clustering→synthesis pipeline
- Add evidence navigation with jump-to-source commands (Section 5.12)
- Replace greedy packer with 3-phase constrained optimization
- Add context fingerprints and suggestion cooldowns (Section 7.2.1)
- Fix SQLite FTS triggers: add missing UPDATE/DELETE triggers
- Add global file locking for dual-persistence coordination (Section 3.7.1)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
